name: GAIA, INC
summary: Gaia, Inc. operates a global digital video subscription service offering over 10,000 titles including yoga classes, documentaries, interviews, and transformation-related content. Over 90% of content is exclusive to Gaia and streamed on most internet-connected devices. Content is organized into four channels: Yoga, Transformation, Alternative Healing, and Seeking Truth. Approximately 40% of members are outside the United States. The company also operates GaiaSphere, a 300-person live event studio in Colorado, and offers a Gaia+ premium membership tier.

products.name: Gaia Streaming Service
products.description: Global digital video subscription platform with over 10,000 titles across Yoga, Transformation, Alternative Healing, and Seeking Truth channels.

products.name: Gaia+ Premium Membership
products.description: Premium annual membership offering live streaming and on-demand access to exclusive GaiaSphere events.

products.name: GaiaSphere
products.description: A 300-person live event studio on the company campus in Colorado used to produce and stream exclusive events.
